text:
STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE
Equipment: Generator GEN-3
Document No: SOP-009
Hazard Level: HIGH

1. PURPOSE
This procedure describes the lockout/tagout and inspection steps required before
performing maintenance on the Generator GEN-3.

2. REQUIRED PPE
Technicians must wear the following before beginning work: hard hat, hearing protection, arc-flash suit.

3. PROCEDURE
   Step 1: Torque check all fasteners to manufacturer spec.
   Step 2: Notify shift supervisor before returning equipment to service.
   Step 3: Torque check all fasteners to manufacturer spec.
   Step 4: Torque check all fasteners to manufacturer spec.
   Step 5: Test emergency stop function.
   Step 6: Isolate energy source and verify zero energy state.

4. NOTES
Deviations from this procedure must be logged and approved by the maintenance supervisor.

ground_truth.required_ppe: hard hat, hearing protection, arc-flash suit
